messages.content: You are a Unicode emoji expert. Be precise and only include emojis that actually exist in Unicode.
List ALL bird emojis that exist in Unicode. For each, give the emoji character and its official name. Only include emojis that truly exist — do not make any up.

response:
Certainly! Here are all the bird emojis that exist in Unicode, with their official names:

1. 🐦 Bird  
2. 🐧 Penguin  
3. 🦉 Owl  
4. 🦅 Eagle  
5. 🦆 Duck  
6. 🦢 Swan  
7. 🦜 Parrot  
8. 🦩 Flamingo  
9. 🕊️ Dove  
10. 🐓 Rooster  
11. 🐔 Chicken  
12. 🐤 Baby Chick  
13. 🐥 Front-Facing Baby Chick  
14. 🐣 Hatching Chick  
15. 🦚 Peacock  
16. 🦃 Turkey  
17. 🦤 Dodo  

These are all the bird emojis officially encoded in Unicode as of June 2024.
